title: User can navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: User can play the audio for the phrase 'Comment vas-tu?'
expected_result: The audio for the phrase 'Comment vas-tu?' plays.

title: User can view the English translation of the phrase 'Comment vas-tu?'
test_steps: Observe the English translation 'How are you?' displayed below the French phrase.
expected_result: The English translation 'How are you?' is visible.

title: User can see the progress bar indicating the current item number
test_steps: Observe the progress bar indicating the user is on the first of ten items.
expected_result: The progress bar shows the user is on the first of ten items.

title: User can navigate to the next item in the vocabulary list
test_steps: Click on the next item in the vocabulary list.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the next item in the vocabulary list.

title: User can navigate to the previous item in the vocabulary list
test_steps: Click on the previous item in the vocabulary list.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the previous item in the vocabulary list.

title: User can view the image of two people sitting at a café
test_steps: Observe the image of two people sitting at a café.
expected_result: The image of two people sitting at a café is visible.

title: User can view the signal strength icon
test_steps: Observe the signal strength icon at the top of the screen.
expected_result: The signal strength icon is visible.

title: User can view the battery icon
test_steps: Observe the battery icon at the top of the screen.

title: User can view the time icon
test_steps: Observe the time icon at the top of the screen.
